title: LOW-INCOME SENIOR CITIZENS WATER DISCOUNT - 211info
text: CITY OF HUBBARD LOW-INCOME SENIOR CITIZENS WATER DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a water utility discount. 3720 Second Street Hubbard, OR 97032 Eligibility: -Age 65 and older -Must meet annual household income requirements -Applications must be renewed annually by July 1st Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-5:30pm (503) 981-6333 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 981-9633 Main phone Main phone (503) 981-6333 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more information. Senior Discount Application available to download online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of annual household income, proof of age AREA SERVED: City of Hubbard Services: Discounted Water Service * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF HUBBARD LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - CITY OF HUBBARD POLICE DEPARTMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF HUBBARD
